---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Beauty Style Pro
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly.
_e.g. "As a professional, I cannot see which clients cancelled…"_

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## User Stories

- As a **[role]**, I want to **[action]** so that **[benefit]**.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, wireframes, or screenshots to help explain your request.
